calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Continued To Mar-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Somita Basu for executor Barbara Kay Northern (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution.

At the outset, the Court inquired why the waiver of accounting on behalf of Anne Lewis had been executed pursuant to a power of attorney and why Anne Lewis did not sign the waiver herself.

The Court also inquired regarding the pet trust provision under the will. Discussion was held regarding whether the pet trust had failed and whether the executor, as the named trustee, was willing to disclaim any interest and represent that the purpose of the trust had failed.

With respect to the waiver of accounting, the Court requested that counsel make efforts to obtain a waiver executed directly by Anne Lewis.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow submission of a trustee disclaimer regarding the pet trust and further efforts to obtain a waiver of accounting executed by Anne Lewis.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Verified Petition For Prelimnary Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 3, 2009 is admitted to probate. Barbara Northern is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond in the amount of $20,000.00 is required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
